name: spec-monkey
description: Spec-driven development in eight skills: running-lifecycle drives the full flow end to end, grounding-specs establishes the project spec (the shared architecture every work item grounds on), shaping-specs works a work item through and converges on a design, reviewing-design critiques that design before a contract is written, writing-specs composes a human-approved, thinly-sliced work-item spec that states WHAT to build and WHEN, reviewing-specs stress-tests the contract, implementing-specs builds it, and auditing-specs verifies the build truly satisfies the spec. The spec never prescribes HOW; that is left to the harness.
